positive: Minimalist silhouette of a majestic woodland creature (deer or stag) leaping through a bioluminescent forest. The style should be a blend of Art Deco and contemporary nature illustration, featuring clean lines, dramatic negative space, and high contrast. The color palette is restricted to deep midnight blues, emerald greens, and touches of ethereal gold/cyan glow. Composition must be centered, making the animal the focal point with a dynamic pose. The overall print must have a repeating pattern or a clear central graphic suitable for placement on t-shirts and mugs. High resolution, vector-like quality, ink wash texture.
